Interface IMatchingStrategy

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractBinaryMatchingStrategy, AbstractMatchingStrategy, AbstractOrdinalMatchingStrategy, AbstractRangeMatchingStrategy, ActivityLevelStrategy, AgePreferenceStrategy, BreedPreferenceStrategy, LifestyleCompatibilityStrategy, SpeciesPreferenceStrategy, VaccinationPreferenceStrategy
public interface IMatchingStrategy
Defines a scoring rule applied by the matching system to evaluate one matching criterion for an adopter-animal pair.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MatchingCriterion
    getCriterion()
    Returns the matching criterion handled by this strategy.
    boolean
    isApplicable(Adopter adopter, Animal animal)
    Returns whether this strategy should contribute to the current adopter-animal match.
    double
    score(Adopter adopter, Animal animal)
    Returns the score contributed by this strategy for the given adopter-animal pair.

  • Method Details

    • getCriterion

      MatchingCriterion getCriterion()
      Returns the matching criterion handled by this strategy.
      Returns:
      the criterion evaluated by this strategy

    • isApplicable

      boolean isApplicable(Adopter adopter, Animal animal)
      Returns whether this strategy should contribute to the current adopter-animal match. A strategy is not applicable when the adopter did not express a preference for the criterion, or when the current design does not yet support evaluating that criterion.
      Parameters:
      adopter - the adopter being evaluated
      animal - the animal being evaluated
      Returns:
      true if this criterion should be counted in the total score; false otherwise

    • score

      double score(Adopter adopter, Animal animal)
      Returns the score contributed by this strategy for the given adopter-animal pair. Implementations should return a normalized value, where larger values indicate stronger compatibility under this criterion. This method is expected to be called only when isApplicable(Adopter, Animal) returns true.
      Parameters:
      adopter - the adopter being evaluated
      animal - the animal being evaluated
      Returns:
      the score contributed by this strategy
